name: duplicate
description: This issue or pull request already exists

name: wontfix
description: This will not be worked on

name: review
description: Links to the published review (linked to the review badge in the rendered article)

name: production
description: Tracks the production/publication pipeline of an accepted manuscript

name: citation
description: Citation metadata (CITATION.cff, DOI, DataCite) needs to be created or updated

name: template-update
description: The vendored Computo Quarto extension or template is out of date
